lines.text: Show Mxrci on it! he-he-he!
(Haan)
Do do ghode Magna ni
Char G-Wagon'an ni
Utte nu main chhe chhe inch chakkiyan
Time laggu mitne nu
Sanu thalle sittne nu
Ikki vaari jor laa lai chhatti'an
Fan ikko naar da main
Das vaari vaarda main
Ohde utton sau-sau diyan gatthiyan
Time laggu mitne nu
Sanu thalle sittne nu
Ikki vaari jor laa lai chhatti
Vall kaddta rekaane hunn tutte na crease
Thoda rukhe aa subaah de sanu aaundi ni tameez
Aa lai tainu ditti saambh laa ni bebe wali chunni
Baitha double R vich paake bapu di kameez
Bahla door ni rekaane hun Ranjheyan nu kheda
Bahla nede nu na jawan bas jhaaka ee bada mera
Bahla ruka na rekaane kite maaran ikk fera
Naddi do vall kha gayi ditta ikk vaari geda
Kithe dabeya rekaane ehna dekh layi dabake
Karaan shopping'an Milan Afghan 'ali kha ke
Tera darji rekaane change karde Mohali
Jutti pairan wich paavan tere Paris'on manga ke
Tin mahine tin change ne location'an rekaane
Nitt UAE ton UK nu rotation'an rekaane
Main taan rukja dimag sala rukda ni mera
Tan hi laa laiye samadhi meditation'an rekaane
Loki sade kolon sikh hunn sanu den mattan
Sanu kinna kuj de giyan ni mitti diyan vattan
Jithon langhe tera yaar maare camera flash
Hun khinch'de ne photo kade khinch de si lattan
Kehndi akh na lagge ve jad di mari tere utte
Sanu sidha ne banage ni halaat sade puthe
Tu taan hune ee tang aagyi biba nindran udake
Sanu kai saal hogye naiyo changi tarah sutte
Naara thaar ke te vairi rakhan saarh ke rekaane
Peende motran te chahan pattu kaarh ke rekaane
Tere bull'an de maare ne main vi ek M laata
Haale navi aa Ferrari jutti jhaad ke rekaane
Dil todte main chhe chhe saak modte
Kataran wich atharan hor pakkian
Duron matha tekdiyan
Mud mud dekh diyan
Assi naiyo ikk vaari takkiyan
Fan ikko naar da main
Das vaari vaarda main
Ohde utton sau sau diyan gatthiyan
Time laggu mitne nu
Sanu thalle sittne nu
Ikki vaari jor laa lai chhatti'an
Oh kudi jatt di fragrance door ton pehchane
Asi aashqui ch nave ni shikari aa purane
Gal sukkda kehndi tu jadon supne ch aavein
Naddi ohdon di saundi aa pani rakh ke sirhane
Main keha chalde rekaane sikke mitran de khote
Aa ke behnde aa rekaane cheene mitran de kothe
Tainu sohniye rekaane karaan hathan naal chhavaan
Jivein karde ne chhavaan sadde pind'an de barote
Tera sau ton paar para hogyi dhilli kuj khaa ke
Teri 'taar da nazar gun powder chhuva ke
Eh ton dar na rekaane dekh akhan wich paa ke
Jadon chaldi Beretta dindi surma bana ke
Kafi kar layi kamai kafi mitran ne udaalayi
Thode humble aa rekaane Lambo nivi karwali
Nave shoran ton rekaane gaddi chaldi ni sidhi
La daan meech ke ankhan nu back ganne di trolly
Lagge gabru di tod kudi tutti payi nu aave
Age naar di fasal jiven phutti payi nu aave
Meri yaad di maari nu tainu hichki rekaane
Sachi barish de gaane wangu sutti payi nu aave
Bechain hogyi ikk kudi fan hogyi
Aujle de kanna wich nattiyan
Kari di ni care kude gaul de ni sher kude
Bhedaan hon baara baari kathiyan
Fan ikko naar da main
Das vaari vaarda main
Ohde utton sau sau diyan gatthiyan
Time laggu mitne nu
Sanu thalle sittne nu
Ikki vaari jor laa lai chhatti'an
